requirement_topic.en: China GB/T EV Charger Baseline versus Moldova Market-Access Package
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T充电桩基线与摩尔多瓦市场准入资料包
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T充電樁基線與摩爾多瓦市場准入資料包

summary.en: Moldova EV access readiness is typically a combined package covering CE-aligned product evidence, EN/TS EN IEC safety and EMC support, ANRE market and interconnection rules, Moldelectrica and local operator documentation, OCPP or backend obligations, and site documentation including labeling and manuals in local acceptance languages.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦EV项目通常以综合包方式判定进入状态，包括CE导向产品证据、EN/TS EN IEC安全和EMC支撑、ANRE市场及并网规则、Moldelectrica与当地运营商文件、OCPP或后台义务，以及包含本地验收语言标签和说明书的现场文件。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦EV專案通常以綜合包方式判定進入狀態，包括CE導向產品證據、EN/TS EN IEC安全和EMC支撐、ANRE市場及併網規則、Moldelectrica與當地營運商文件、OCPP或後台義務，以及包含當地驗收語言標籤和說明書的現場文件。

standards_or_laws: CE technical file and declaration route
ANRE EV interconnection and market requirements
Moldova operator-side commissioning and backend acceptance

summary.en: China documents usually start with GB/T 18487.1, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930, plus CCC or domestic certification. Those are useful for mapping but should be treated as baseline documents only unless project-specific Moldova evidence is added.
summary.zh: 中国通常从GB/T 18487.1、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930以及CCC或国内认证入手，这些对条款映射有价值，但除非补充摩尔多瓦项目证据，否则只应作为基线文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常從GB/T 18487.1、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930以及CCC或國內認證入手，這些對條款映射有價值，但除非補充摩爾多瓦專案證據，否則僅作為基線文件。

gap.en: A defendable Moldova market file should include model-level GB/T-to-IEC mapping, connector and cable compatibility mapping for Type 2 / CCS2, interconnection and charging-service obligations, OCPP version and security profile, local language labels and manuals, operator and maintenance responsibilities, and an unresolved item list.
gap.zh: 用于摩尔多瓦可辩护的准入文件应包括GB/T与IEC逐条映射、Type 2/CCS2接口与线缆兼容清单、并网与充电服务义务、OCPP版本与安全档位、摩尔多瓦现场语言标签和手册、运营与维护责任分工，以及未决项目清单。
gap.zht: 用於摩爾多瓦可辯護之准入文件應包括GB/T與IEC逐條映射、Type 2/CCS2介面與電纜相容清單、併網與充電服務義務、OCPP版本與安全等級、摩爾多瓦現場語言標籤與手冊、營運與維護責任分工，以及未決項目清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed: CE and electrical safety requirements are mandatory where in scope; ANRE interconnection and service obligations are mandatory for regulated charging operation; connector and backend requirements follow project, operator, or tender terms
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T baseline and domestic certification are preparatory references only, not direct Moldova market authorization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a Moldova-specific package after GB/T mapping rather than claiming full market readiness from China baseline documents alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应先完成GB/T映射后建立摩尔多瓦专属资料包，而不是仅凭中国基线文件宣称完整市场就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應先完成GB/T映射後建立摩爾多瓦專屬資料包，而非僅憑中國基線文件宣稱完整市場就緒。
